title: Grilled Pepper Skewers with Portuguese Flair
description: A flavorful and colorful dish featuring marinated peppers, onions, and tomatoes, grilled to perfection on skewers, with a hint of Portuguese influence.
instructions: 2. Cut peppers, onions, and tomatoes into bite-sized pieces.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together Portuguese seasonings, olive oil, and a pinch of salt and pepper.
4. Add the vegetables to the bowl and toss to coat.
5. Thread the vegetables onto the skewers, leaving a little space between each piece.
6. Brush the grill with oil to prevent sticking.
7. Grill the skewers for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the vegetables are tender.
8. Remove from heat and serve hot.
